body_txt: With a little Refuge in Audacity , a clipboard is an unreasonably effective disguise for carrying out a Bavarian Fire Drill . It greatly enhances the credibility of a workplace uniform for construction, medicine , police , inspection , delivery , or hospitality . Nothing terrifies human beings as much as an Obstructive Bureaucrat on the move. In technological settings, a Data Pad also works. As shows like The Real Hustle can attest, this is Truth in Television .
